meta.title: Find Jobs | Pro-Tech Staffing — Manufacturing & Industrial Jobs
meta.description: Find manufacturing, warehouse, and industrial jobs near you. Pro-Tech Staffing places workers in electronics, light industrial, warehouse, and supply chain roles across 6 US markets.

hero.heading: Looking for work? We place people fast.
hero.description: We work with companies across electronics manufacturing, light industrial, warehouse, supply chain, and administrative environments. Steady work, weekly pay, and real opportunities to move into permanent roles.

whyProTech.heading: Real jobs. Real support.
whyProTech.description: We don't just send you to a job site and disappear. Our recruiters know the roles, the companies, and the environments. You get placed where you can succeed.

fastPlacement.title: Fast Placement
fastPlacement.desc: We move quickly. Many workers start within days of their first conversation with a recruiter.

roleMatched.title: Role-Matched
roleMatched.desc: We match you based on your skills, experience, shift preference, and location — not just availability.

tempToHirePaths.title: Temp-to-Hire Paths
tempToHirePaths.desc: Many of our placements convert to permanent positions. Show up, do the work, and earn a full-time offer.

localRecruiters.title: Local Recruiters
localRecruiters.desc: Your recruiter knows the companies in your area. They can tell you what to expect before day one.

trainingCertification.title: Training & Certification
trainingCertification.desc: We offer IPC certification training (IPC-610, IPC-620, J-STD-001) for electronics manufacturing roles.

weeklyPay.title: Weekly Pay
weeklyPay.desc: Get paid every week. No waiting around for monthly checks.

industries.heading: Jobs across manufacturing, warehouse, and industrial.

electronicsManufacturing.title: Electronics Manufacturing
electronicsManufacturing.desc: PCB assembly, SMT, soldering, QC inspection, test technicians, AOI operators, rework.

lightIndustrial.title: Light Industrial
lightIndustrial.desc: Assemblers, machine operators, production workers, quality control, packaging.

warehouseDistribution.title: Warehouse & Distribution
warehouseDistribution.desc: Picking, packing, receiving, forklift, shipping, inventory, 3PL support.

supplyChainLogistics.title: Supply Chain & Logistics
supplyChainLogistics.desc: Logistics coordinators, inventory control, shipping and receiving.

administrative.title: Administrative
administrative.desc: Data entry, customer support, clerical, back-office operations.

locations.heading: Jobs near you.
locations.description: We have offices and active openings in six US markets. Find jobs in your area.

openPositions.heading: Current openings.
openPositions.description: Browse our latest job openings or submit a general application to be considered for future roles.
openPositions.placeholder: Job board coming soon. In the meantime, submit a general application and our recruiters will match you with open roles.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Call us or submit your information. Our recruiters will reach out to match you with available roles in your area.
